## Latest status banner (mirrored from website footer)

**Pillar 4 sub-task 3 (SO(10) ŌåÆ SU(5)├ŚU(1)$_\chi$ ŌåÆ G$_{\rm SM}$ breaking pattern)** is **PROVED CONDITIONAL** on Pillar 6 Higgs mechanism (Math229).

**Recommended next dispatcher actions**: Task #169 (Math220-AddB strict $\kappa_{\min} > C_m + C_d$ constant-bound theorem) and Task #170 (Pillar 6 Higgs scalar potential derivation).
